requirement_topic.en: IANOR NA / IEC 62109 Inverter Safety Certification
requirement_topic.zh: IANOR NA / IEC 62109 逆变器安全认证
requirement_topic.zht: IANOR NA / IEC 62109 逆變器安全認證

summary.en: IANOR (Institut Algérien de Normalisation) is Algeria's national standardisation body, responsible for developing and adopting Algerian standards (NA prefix). Algeria adopts IEC standards as Algerian National Standards (NA) through the IANOR framework. Solar PV inverters are expected to meet IEC 62109-1 (safety for power converters — general requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (safety for PV inverters) as referenced in IANOR conformity and project procurement specifications. Algerian legislation on product conformity and technical regulation may require IANOR conformity attestation or an accepted third-party test report from an accredited laboratory against these standards before a product can be placed on the Algerian market or connected to the Sonelgaz grid. Large-scale solar project tenders (Solar 1000, follow-on programmes targeting 3 000–4 000 MW) typically require IEC-evidenced safety documentation as part of tender technical specifications.
summary.zh: IANOR（阿尔及利亚国家标准化研究所）是阿尔及利亚国家标准机构，负责制定和采标阿尔及利亚国家标准（NA前缀）。阿尔及利亚通过IANOR框架将IEC标准采纳为阿尔及利亚国家标准（NA）。光伏逆变器应符合IEC 62109-1（电力变换器安全——通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（光伏逆变器安全），这些标准在IANOR合格评定和项目采购规格中有所引用。阿尔及利亚产品合格性和技术法规立法可能要求在产品进入阿尔及利亚市场或接入Sonelgaz电网前取得IANOR合格证明或认可实验室针对上述标准出具的第三方测试报告。大型太阳能项目招标（Solar 1000及后续3,000–4,000 MW计划）通常将IEC安全文件证据作为招标技术规格的组成部分。
summary.zht: IANOR（阿爾及利亞國家標準化研究所）是阿爾及利亞國家標準機構，負責制定和採標阿爾及利亞國家標準（NA前綴）。阿爾及利亞通過IANOR框架將IEC標準採納為阿爾及利亞國家標準（NA）。光伏逆變器應符合IEC 62109-1（電力變換器安全——通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（光伏逆變器安全），這些標準在IANOR合格評定和項目採購規格中有所引用。阿爾及利亞產品合格性和技術法規立法可能要求在產品進入阿爾及利亞市場或接入Sonelgaz電網前取得IANOR合格證明或認可實驗室針對上述標準出具的第三方測試報告。大型太陽能項目招標（Solar 1000及後續3,000–4,000 MW計畫）通常將IEC安全文件證據作為招標技術規格的組成部分。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 as referenced in IANOR NA framework (safety for power converters — general requirements)
IEC 62109-2 as referenced in IANOR NA framework (safety for PV inverters)
Algerian technical regulations on product conformity and electrical equipment market surveillance
Solar 1000 / follow-on tender technical specifications (CREG / Ministry of Energy)
IEC 61727 (PV systems — characteristics of the utility interface)

summary.en: China solar PV inverter safety is governed by GB/T 37408-2021 (technical specification for PV grid-connected inverters) and supplementary NB/T 32004 or T/CPIA group standards. GB/T 37408-2021 covers protection and safety functions but is not identical in scope or test methodology to IEC 62109-1/2. A Chinese test report against GB/T 37408-2021 is not directly accepted by IANOR or an Algerian project owner or tender authority without supplementary IEC-route evidence.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全以GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术规范）及NB/T 32004或T/CPIA团体标准为依据。GB/T 37408-2021涵盖保护与安全功能，但与IEC 62109-1/2的适用范围和测试方法不完全相同。仅凭GB/T 37408-2021测试报告不能被IANOR、阿尔及利亚项目业主或招标机构直接接受，需提供补充IEC路径证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全以GB/T 37408-2021（光伏併網逆變器技術規範）及NB/T 32004或T/CPIA團體標準為依據。GB/T 37408-2021涵蓋保護與安全功能，但與IEC 62109-1/2的適用範圍和測試方法不完全相同。僅憑GB/T 37408-2021測試報告不能被IANOR、阿爾及利亞項目業主或招標機構直接接受，需提供補充IEC路徑證據。

gap.en: Obtain or commission test reports from an accredited laboratory against IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2, and prepare a declaration of conformity or IANOR conformity-mark application for the Algeria market. Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 test data may support a gap analysis but does not replace IEC-route evidence. Confirm with IANOR or the Algerian project owner or tender authority whether IANOR conformity attestation is mandatory before sale, import, or grid connection.
gap.zh: 应委托认可实验室出具IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试报告，并准备符合性声明或IANOR合格标志申请。中国GB/T 37408-2021测试数据可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路径证据。在销售、进口或并网前，应与IANOR或阿尔及利亚项目业主或招标机构确认是否须强制取得IANOR合格证明。
gap.zht: 應委託認可實驗室出具IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試報告，並準備符合性聲明或IANOR合格標誌申請。中國GB/T 37408-2021測試數據可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路徑證據。在銷售、進口或併網前，應與IANOR或阿爾及利亞項目業主或招標機構確認是否須強制取得IANOR合格證明。

mandatory_status.target: De facto mandatory for tender participation in CREG / Ministry of Energy solar auctions; IANOR NA / IEC 62109 compliance is the expected technical route; project-owner or lender requirements may make it contractually mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid-connected PV inverters under Chinese market surveillance; GB/T 37408-2021 is the applicable standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 test evidence is a useful starting point but does not satisfy the IANOR / IEC 62109 route expected for Algeria. Commission IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 testing from an accredited laboratory before shipment or tender submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408-2021测试证据是有用的起点，但不满足阿尔及利亚预期的IANOR/IEC 62109路径。出货或提交招标文件前应委托认可实验室完成IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408-2021測試證據是有用的起點，但不滿足阿爾及利亞預期的IANOR/IEC 62109路徑。出貨或提交招標文件前應委託認可實驗室完成IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2測試。

requirement_topic.en: EMC and Anti-Islanding Requirements for PV Inverters in Algeria
requirement_topic.zh: 阿尔及利亚光伏逆变器的电磁兼容与防孤岛要求
requirement_topic.zht: 阿爾及利亞光伏逆變器的電磁兼容與防孤島要求

summary.en: Algeria applies IEC-based electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) standards through IANOR NA adoption. Power conversion equipment including PV inverters should meet relevant IEC 62920 (EMC requirements for PV power generation systems) and IEC CISPR conducted and radiated emission limits. Anti-islanding protection must comply with IEC 62116 (utility-interconnected PV inverters — test procedure for islanding prevention measures). Sonelgaz and OS may specify additional EMC and protection requirements in their grid-connection technical specifications and project-specific requirements. Algeria's large-scale solar tender specifications (Solar 1000 programme and follow-on tenders) typically reference IEC EMC and anti-islanding standards as eligibility criteria.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚通过IANOR NA采标方式执行基于IEC的电磁兼容标准。光伏逆变器等电力转换设备应满足IEC 62920（光伏发电系统电磁兼容要求）及相关IEC CISPR传导和辐射发射限值要求。防孤岛保护须符合IEC 62116（与公用电网并联的光伏逆变器——防孤岛措施测试程序）。Sonelgaz和OS可能在其并网技术规格和项目特定要求中规定额外的电磁兼容和保护要求。阿尔及利亚大型太阳能招标规格（Solar 1000计划及后续招标）通常将IEC电磁兼容和防孤岛标准作为资格标准。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞通過IANOR NA採標方式執行基於IEC的電磁兼容標準。光伏逆變器等電力轉換設備應滿足IEC 62920（光伏發電系統電磁兼容要求）及相關IEC CISPR傳導和輻射發射限值要求。防孤島保護須符合IEC 62116（與公用電網並聯的光伏逆變器——防孤島措施測試程序）。Sonelgaz和OS可能在其併網技術規格和項目特定要求中規定額外的電磁兼容和保護要求。阿爾及利亞大型太陽能招標規格（Solar 1000計畫及後續招標）通常將IEC電磁兼容和防孤島標準作為資格標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 (EMC requirements for PV power generation systems) as referenced via IANOR NA
IEC 62116 (utility-interconnected PV inverters — test procedure for islanding prevention measures)
IEC CISPR 11 / CISPR 32 conducted and radiated emission limits as adopted via IANOR NA
IEC 61000 series immunity standards as referenced in Sonelgaz grid-connection specifications
Solar 1000 / follow-on tender EMC and protection eligibility requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters are tested for EMC under GB/T 17626 series and GB 4824 (CISPR 11 equivalent), and for anti-islanding under GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 which incorporate anti-islanding test methodologies. These Chinese test results give useful technical evidence but are not equivalent to IANOR NA / IEC 62920 or IEC 62116 certifications for the Algeria market. Chinese inverters exported to tender programmes will require IEC 62116 test certificates specifically.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器依据GB/T 17626系列和GB 4824（CISPR 11等效）进行电磁兼容测试，防孤岛依据GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004（包含防孤岛测试方法）测试。这些中国测试结果具有一定技术参考价值，但不等同于阿尔及利亚市场的IANOR NA/IEC 62920或IEC 62116认证。出口阿尔及利亚招标项目的中国逆变器须专门提供IEC 62116测试证书。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器依據GB/T 17626系列和GB 4824（CISPR 11等效）進行電磁兼容測試，防孤島依據GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004（包含防孤島測試方法）測試。這些中國測試結果具有一定技術參考價值，但不等同於阿爾及利亞市場的IANOR NA/IEC 62920或IEC 62116認證。出口阿爾及利亞招標項目的中國逆變器須專門提供IEC 62116測試證書。

gap.en: Supplement Chinese EMC test evidence with IEC 62920-route tests from an accredited laboratory. Obtain an IEC 62116 anti-islanding test certificate for the specific inverter model, as this is commonly required by Sonelgaz and Algeria solar tender technical specifications. Verify project-specific EMC and protection requirements with the Sonelgaz network operator or the project engineer before final equipment selection.
gap.zh: 应以认可实验室出具的IEC 62920路径测试补充中国电磁兼容测试证据。针对特定逆变器型号取得IEC 62116防孤岛测试证书，该证书通常是Sonelgaz和阿尔及利亚太阳能招标技术规格的要求。在最终设备选型前，应与Sonelgaz电网运营商或项目工程师核实项目特定的电磁兼容和保护要求。
gap.zht: 應以認可實驗室出具的IEC 62920路徑測試補充中國電磁兼容測試證據。針對特定逆變器型號取得IEC 62116防孤島測試證書，該證書通常是Sonelgaz和阿爾及利亞太陽能招標技術規格的要求。在最終設備選型前，應與Sonelgaz電網營運商或項目工程師核實項目特定的電磁兼容和保護要求。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62116 anti-islanding certification is de facto mandatory for Solar 1000 / CREG tender participation and Sonelgaz grid connection; IEC 62920 EMC evidence is expected by project owners and lenders
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese CCC or voluntary certification routes; GB 4824 / GB/T 17626 are the applicable EMC standards; anti-islanding under GB/T 37408-2021

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese EMC test reports are technically comparable but not directly accepted as IANOR NA / IEC 62920 conformity evidence for Algeria. Obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 62920 EMC test certificates from an accredited laboratory before tender submission or grid connection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电磁兼容测试报告在技术上具有参考价值，但不能直接作为阿尔及利亚IANOR NA/IEC 62920合格证据接受。在提交招标文件或并网前，应从认可实验室获取IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 62920电磁兼容测试证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電磁兼容測試報告在技術上具有參考價值，但不能直接作為阿爾及利亞IANOR NA/IEC 62920合格證據接受。在提交招標文件或併網前，應從認可實驗室獲取IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 62920電磁兼容測試證書。
